name: Bilt Mastercard
perks: Earn points on rent payments with no processing fee (up to 100,000 points per year)
3x points on dining, 2x on travel, 1x on other purchases
Points transfer to 15+ airline and hotel partners at 1:1 (United, American, Hyatt, Marriott, and more)
Rent Day bonus: double points on all non-rent purchases on the 1st of the month
Purchase protection and cell phone protection
drawbacks: Must make at least 5 transactions per statement period to earn rent points
Rent payment must go through Bilt's payment system
Not all landlords are in the Bilt Alliance (direct payment option has limitations)
